sectionHeadings: 018 — Claude Code skills and agents: the agentic surface
record.summary: The agentic surface: seven skills under .claude/skills/ (init, setup, commit, implement-plan, research, validate-and-fix, cleanup), four pipeline agents under .claude/agents/ (architect, explorer, implementer, reviewer), and the frontmatter schemas that govern their shape. Skills perform all governed reads through the spec-spine CLI; the whole surface is a hashed index input, so quiet edits trip the staleness gate.
record.title: Claude Code skills and agents: the agentic surface
